_note: IG carousel config for turkey-rice-stew. Bland-diet recipe — imagery skews clean, comforting, plate-in-bowl rather than styled pile.

Rustic kitchen background softly out of focus. Shot on 50mm at f/2.8, warm tungsten highlights, shallow depth of field. Clean and comforting, not styled or fancy — this is a bland-diet recovery meal. title: I Cooked for Nalla at 1AM
ig_caption:
1AM. Nalla had been sick all day. Vet said "bland diet." Google said nothing useful.

Here's what actually worked — the 5-ingredient turkey & rice stew I now batch-cook the moment her stomach acts up:

✅ Turkey breast (lean, no skin)
✅ White rice (NOT brown — easier on her belly)
✅ Pumpkin — 1 tbsp, fiber
✅ Bone broth (no salt, no onion)
✅ Water

30 min. Brown → simmer → cool. Freezes 30 days.

Real talk: this needs to be in your freezer BEFORE the next stomach bug — not learned during one.

Save this 🔖 → your future-1am-self will thank you.

Full recipe + exact amounts: link in bio

👉 What's your go-to when your pup's belly acts up?

#sensitivestomach #dogrecovery #blanddietfordogs #petparent #nallasdad #dogfoodandfun
fb_caption:
1AM. Nalla had been sick all day. The vet said "bland diet." Google said nothing useful.

Here's what actually worked — the 5-ingredient turkey & rice stew I batch-cook the moment her stomach acts up:

• Turkey breast (lean, no skin)
• White rice (not brown — easier to digest)
• Pumpkin — 1 tbsp, for fiber
• Bone broth (no salt, no onion)
• Water

30 minutes. Brown, simmer, cool. Freezes 30 days.

What I wish I'd known at 1am: this needs to be in the freezer BEFORE the next bug — not learned during one.
